# Y Lab — Agentic Systems for Solopreneurs

> Y Lab is an authority blog and newsletter focused on building high-leverage business systems using AI agents, MCP (Model Context Protocol), and the "Agentic Stack". We help solo-founders scale to $50k MRR with zero headcount.

## Quick Links

- **Website**: https://ylab.netlify.app
- **Newsletter**: https://ylab.netlify.app#subscribe
- **Twitter**: https://twitter.com/ylab_ai

## Latest Insights (AI Daily)

- **The 180-Page Blitz (March 30)**: https://ylab.netlify.app/posts/ai-daily-03-30-2026/
- **Beehiiv + MCP Integration**: https://ylab.netlify.app/posts/ai-daily-03-29-2026/
- **Era of the Local Solo-HQ**: https://ylab.netlify.app/posts/ai-daily-03-28-2026/

## Core Themes

### 1. The Agentic Stack
- Using Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini as business managers, not just chat interfaces.
- Connecting AI to real-world data via MCP.
- Building "Context-Aware" autonomous workflows.

### 2. Solo-Founders at Scale
- How "一人公司" (One-Person Company) leverages AI to compete with 10-person agencies.
- Automated content saturation (SEO Blitz).
- Revenue-first development (Supabase + Stripe).

### 3. Market Interception
- Identifying high-intent niches (UK Visa, Parking Fines, AI CVs).
- Direct response marketing via Reddit and X.
- AEO (AI Engine Optimization) vs traditional SEO.

- **March 23**: The $50k MRR Agentic Stack.
